1. Logistics
  2. Style and Content

Quiz 2 will cover all the content from the beginning of the class up to and including Lecture 18 but will focus on lists and conditionals.

Logistics

  • In-person here in the Auditorium during class (ANU Students please keep an eye out for an email from me this 1 week before with accommodations details)
  • Taken on the Lockdown Browser on your personal computer; details on how to set it up are on our Canvas page.
  • Practice Quiz available on Canvas
    • there’s also tips on how to use a Practice Quiz effectively
    • there will be two versions: one that requires the Lockdown Browser (so you can test that you’ve got it setup correctly) and one that does not so you can take it and refer to other resources
  • We’ll do additional review on Monday in-class

Style and Content

The questions will be more like the practice quizzes on Canvas than the homework exercises. This is because the homework exercises are designed to take a larger amount of time than, for example, the shorter problems we tackle in class. That being said, as you’ll see in Practice Quiz 2, there will be questions that depend on you having completed the HW assignments by your self. If you relied heavily on other’s help to complete the HWs, you should revisit them and make sure you understand them.

  • Study Guide
  • Please do the practice mini-quizzes
  • Full Length Practice Quiz on Canvas
